calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Betel Gebreyesus, self-represented plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Sep-10-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. All previously issued sanctions issued against the plaintiff in pro per are vacated. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
